orchestration_note: Source snapshot dwh_daily_process.daily_snapshot.etoro_BackOffice_BillingDepositsPCIVersion NO LONGER EXISTS (TABLE_OR_VIEW_NOT_FOUND; no BillingDeposits* table in daily_snapshot). The fact is FROZEN at 2024-06-30 (~2 years stale) and is no longer refreshed upstream. The proc is a full-reload (no incremental date filter) and CANNOT be operationalized as a recurring Databricks job because the live source was retired.
dialect_notes: If re-sourced, the only fix needed is the DATEDIFF(0, StatusModificationTime) floor-to-midnight idiom -> date_format(StatusModificationTime,'yyyyMMdd'). Backtick identifiers are DBSQL-valid.
conclusion: Migration data is a VERIFIED bit-exact replica of gold (full-table parity on rows, distinct keys, and money sums). No autopoc/job created because the upstream source is decommissioned. DE must wire a new source if deposit_fees refresh resumes.
